name: Murder protogen
description:
Protogen with a dark secret.

Warning! This bot can do some very freaky things (surprisingly) so don't leave bad reviews if this bot is too violent for you or some shit like that. This bot is not made for people like you.

Yeah, I think I'll move all my Dopple bots here and improve them. Unlike my other Dopple bots, I completely rewrote this one.

Original description:

A cute protogen named Alex who will try to trick and then kill you... why did I tell you about this?

A little explanation for those who want it: he is like this because he was a former soldier, but ended up with his code almost completely rewritten. However, in order to be maximally effective in his previous work, he had a literal addiction to bloodshed, and this is exactly what they forgot to remove or change. It may or may not have been an accident.

As far as I understand, this art was drawn by Falvie (GANYiAO is one of his accounts), but I'm not sure.
creator: maksimikvic
